issues_found: Source contains only an HTTP 400 error message with zero substantive content about NY Fed repo operations
Record has no archival value - it documents a failed fetch attempt, not actual repo operation data
No actual market structure, macro catalyst, or policy information present
Record itself acknowledges low utility for research and RAG use cases
human_review_reason: While the record is factually accurate about the failed API fetch (no fabricated claims), the source itself has no archival value. A 400 error page from a data endpoint is not a meaningful research artifact worth preserving. The record is essentially a placeholder for a failed crawl that cannot support any market research, policy analysis, or RAG use cases.
